1200005178.english: - After the conflict with Adam, an empty hospital room.

1200005180.english: You're talking nonsense about something you don't even understand properly...
1200005180.korean: 제대로 알지도 못 하는 주제에 멋대로 지껄이긴…

1200005181.english: - Ji-seok slammed his fist hard against the laboratory wall with empty eyes.
1200005181.korean: - 지석은 공허한 눈으로 실험실 벽을 거세게 내리쳤다.

1200005182.english: - Ji-seok's fists were often bruised and bleeding before his wounds could even heal.
1200005182.korean: - 지석의 주먹은 상처가 채 아물기도 전에 짓무르고 터지기 일쑤였다.

1200005183.english: - Someone cautiously opened the door to the empty hospital room.
1200005183.korean: - 누군가 빈 병실의 문을 조심스레 열었다.

1200005186.english: - Ji-seok, aware of Adam's gaze fixed on his hands, quickly hid his messy fists.
1200005186.korean: - 지석은 애덤의 시선이 향해있는 자신의 손을 의식하고는 서둘러 엉망이된 두 주먹을 감췄다.

1200005187.english: Did you come all this way to examine a madman? Are you just watching?
1200005187.korean: 정신병자 진찰 봉사하러 여기까지 온 건가? 구경났어?

1200005189.english: You've been having fun watching me talk nonsense all this time, haven't you? Huh?
1200005189.korean: 그동안 헛소리 하는 날 두고 재밌었잖아, 응?

1200005190.english: It's really easy to make someone an idiot, isn't it?
1200005190.korean: 사람 하나 병신 만들기 참 쉽다, 그치?

1200005191.english: Did you get your tongue cut off? Even if it's just an excuse, I want you to say something!
1200005191.korean: 혀 잘렸어? 변명이라도 좋으니까 뭐든 말 좀 해보란 말이야!

1200005192.english: Honestly, even you'd agree my life is a complete mess.
1200005192.korean: 솔직히 네가 봐도 내 인생은 시궁창급이잖아,

1200005195.english: - Ji-seok chuckled again and continued speaking.
1200005195.korean: - 지석은 다시 한번 헛웃음을 치며 말을 이어나갔다.

1200005196.english: Oh...! Or are you saying you're finally going to be a proper son to your mother, who fed and housed this lunatic?
1200005196.korean: 아..! 아니면 이런 정신병자를 먹이고 재워준 어머님께 이제라도 제대로 된 아들 노릇 좀 해보겠다는 거냐?

1200005198.english: It seems you've grown disillusioned with the place you grew up together.
1200005198.korean: 함께 자란 연고지에 회의감이라도 생긴 모양이지?

1200005199.english: Sorry, sorry. Did I laugh too much? I'm the crazy one!
1200005199.korean: 미안, 미안. 너무 웃었나? 미친 새끼는 난데!

1200005200.english: - As Ji-seok's self-deprecating monolog ended, Adam opened his tightly closed mouth.
1200005200.korean: - 지석의 자학 섞인 독백이 끝나자 애덤이 굳게 닫혀있던 입을 열었다.

1200005203.english: I've done all I can. Rachel will be grateful to you too. Because he's my younger brother, I can tell.
1200005203.korean: 할 만큼 했어. 레이첼도 너한테 고마울거야. 내동생이니까 알 수 있어.

1200005206.english: - Ji-seok begins to laugh maniacally, as if his mind has completely collapsed.
1200005206.korean: - 지석은 가히 정신이 붕괴된 사람처럼 미친듯 웃어대기 시작한다.

1200005207.english: You came all this way and all you have to say is what?
1200005207.korean: 여기까지 와놓고 고작 하는 말이 뭐?

1200005210.english: - Ji-seok strode toward Adam, who was standing at the entrance of the hospital room, and grabbed him by the collar with lightning speed.
1200005210.korean: - 지석은 병실 입구에 서있는 애덤을 향해 쏘아붙이는 속도로 다가와 멱살을 그러쥐었다.

1200005211.english: What the hell is this guy saying right now...?

1200005212.english: Hey, you son of a bitch...

1200005215.english: Are you saying we should let go now...?

1200005216.english: Your younger sister died unjustly in the prime of her life...
1200005216.korean: 네 여동생은 한창일 나이에 억울하게 죽었는데…

1200005217.english: Are you, who calls yourself "Big Brother," spouting such nonsense?
1200005217.korean: 오빠라는 네 놈 입에선 그딴 헛소리가 나와?

1200005218.english: The whole reason we started working together in the first place was because...
1200005218.korean: 애초에 우리가 같이 일을 시작하기로 했던 건,

1200005219.english: Wasn't it because we both wanted to cure Rachel's illness?!
1200005219.korean: 우리 두 사람 모두 레이첼의 병을 고치고 싶다는 염원 때문 아니었어?!

1200005221.english: This guy, You're not saying anything again...
1200005221.korean: 이 자식, 또 아무 말도 안 하네…

1200005223.english: When they think they're at a disadvantage, they just keep their mouth shut.
1200005223.korean: 자기가 불리하다고 생각하면, 입을 꾹 닫고 있지.

1200005224.english: Your cowardly and despicable behavior makes me feel disillusioned with our relationship.
1200005224.korean: 너의 그런 비열한 겁쟁이 같은 모습 때문에, 우리 관계에 대한 환멸을 느껴.

1200005227.english: ... That's right, I started this for Rachel too.
1200005227.korean: ...나 역시 레이첼을 위해서 이 일을 시작한게 맞아.

1200005229.english: But you and I are different.

1200005230.english: You only care about Rachel, and everything else is just a means to an end.
1200005230.korean: 너는 오로지 레이첼 하나만을 위해서, 그 이외의 것들은 그저 수단으로 생각하잖아.

1200005234.english: - Ji-seok, who had been grabbing Adam's collar, loosened his grip, leaned against the hallway wall for a moment, and laughed like a madman.
1200005234.korean: - 애덤의 멱살을 잡고 있던 지석은 손에 힘을 풀고 한번 복도 벽에 기대 미치광이처럼 웃었다.

1200005235.english: Hahaha... I'm laughing because it's so ridiculous...
1200005235.korean: 큭큭큭… 어이가 없어서 웃음이 다 나오네…

1200005236.english: You're the one who's lost their mind, caring about such a parasite... aren't you?
1200005236.korean: 너야말로 그런 밥벌레 따위에 신경을 쓰다니, 정신이 어떻게 된거 아니야…?

1200005238.english: ...Kim Ji-seok, aren't you being careful with your words?

1200005239.english: So, you felt even a little bit of pity for those things?
1200005239.korean: 뭐 그깟 것들에 대해 같잖은 동정심이라도 느낀 거야?

1200005240.english: - This time, Adam reversed the situation, grabbing Ji-seok by the scruff of the neck and shoving him against the end of the hallway wall as if throwing a bundle.
1200005240.korean: - 이번엔 역으로 애덤이 지석의 목덜미를 그러쥐며 봇짐을 던지듯 복도 벽 끝으로 몰아붙였다.

1200005242.english: You're the one who should say it again...

1200005245.english: Even Eva is just one of those things to you?!
1200005245.korean: 에바도 너한텐 고작 그깟 것들 수준 밖에 안 된단 말이야?!

1200005246.english: Um... It seems you're seriously mistaken...

1200005247.english: I've never once thought of your wife as an equal human being.
1200005247.korean: 난 단 한 번도 네 아내를 동등한 인간으로서 생각해 본 적이 없어.

1200005248.english: Just a guinea pig put on the operating table to cure Rachel's illness.
1200005248.korean: 단지 레이첼의 병을 고치기 위해 실험대에 올린 모르모트일 뿐.

1200005252.english: From the beginning, this experiment was designed for 'Rachel' alone, not for your wife.
1200005252.korean: 처음부터 이 실험은 '레이첼'만을 위해 고안되었지, 네 아내를 위해 만들어진 게 아니었어.

1200005253.english: What did you do, knowing the failure was inevitable?
1200005253.korean: 당연한 실패를 예상한 넌 어떻게 했지?

1200005254.english: I came up with a new formula just for that woman.
1200005254.korean: 그 여자만을 위한 공식을 새로 만들어냈어.

1200005255.english: Who can compensate for the time and capital poured into that?
1200005255.korean: 거기에 쏟아부은 시간과 자본은 누가 보상해 줄 수 있지?

1200005256.english: That woman is nothing short of a spoiler who ruined my ambitions.
1200005256.korean: 그 여잔… 내 야망을 망친 훼방꾼이나 다름 없어.

1200005257.english: Even if you play well, you'll only be experiment number 1 of the Saman.
1200005257.korean: 잘 쳐줘봤자 삼안의 실험 번호 1번에 불과하겠군.

1200005258.english: Every single word is just awful...
1200005258.korean: 정말 말 한마디 한마디가 최악이 아닐 수 없군…

1200005259.english: It's so disgusting, I feel like throwing up every meal I ever ate with you right now...
1200005259.korean: 너무 역겨워서 당장이라도 너와 먹었던 식사 전부를 게워내고 싶을 지경이야…

1200005260.english: Aren't you even ashamed of how Rachel, who's dead, would feel if she saw you like this right now...?
1200005260.korean: 너, 지금 네 상태를 죽은 레이첼이 보면 어떻게 생각할 지 부끄럽지도 않아…?

1200005261.english: Look at your state right now, do you think you're normal?
1200005261.korean: 지금 네 상태를 봐, 네가 정상이라고 생각해?

1200005263.english: Don't just jump to conclusions and say they're dead...

1200005264.english: So, is Rachel alive right now?

1200005267.english: It's past the point where I can just grit my teeth and bear it, Kim Ji-seok! I'm sick of your nonsense!
1200005267.korean: 참고 견뎌 줄 단계는 지났어, 김지석! 네 헛소리에 진절머리가 나!

1200005268.english: You're just denying reality to make yourself feel better, aren't you?
1200005268.korean: 그저 네 마음 하나 편하자고 현실을 부정 하는 꼴이라니,

1200005269.english: Rather, I almost want to deny the fact that my sister liked you.
1200005269.korean: 오히려 난 내 여동생이 널 좋아했다는 사실을 부정하고 싶을 정도군.

1200005270.english: - Ji-seok couldn't contain his rising anger and pushed Adam, causing him to fall over.
1200005270.korean: - 지석은 차오르는 분노를 참지 못하고 애덤의 몸을 밀어 넘어뜨렸다.

1200005271.english: - The two of them tumbled and rolled along the hallway, like teenage boys trying to relive their childhood firsthand.
1200005271.korean: - 둘은 마치 유년 시절을 몸소 회상하려는 사춘기 소년처럼, 복도 위로 뒤엉키며 뒹굴었다.

1200005272.english: - After getting on Adam's body and punching him in the face a few more times, Ji-seok grabbed his collar and shouted in a heightened voice.
1200005272.korean: - 애덤의 몸뚱이에 올라탄 지석은 다시 한번 애덤의 안면에 주먹을 몇 번 꽂아 넣은 뒤 멱살을 잡으며 고조된 목소리로 소리 질렀다.

1200005273.english: You're the one who should answer...!

1200005274.english: What were you doing when Rachel was dying...?
1200005274.korean: 레이첼이 죽어갈 때 넌 대체 뭘 하고 있었지…?

1200005276.english: When your beloved sister was trampled by people and growing cold, what in the world were you doing, Adam?!
1200005276.korean: 네가 그토록 아끼는 여동생이 사람들한테 밟혀 싸늘하게 식어갈 때, 애덤 넌 대체 뭘 하고 있었냐고…!

1200005277.english: In that short time, why did they leave their seat in the first place...?
1200005277.korean: 그 잠깐 사이에, 도대체 왜 자리를 비운거지…?

1200005279.english: - Ji-seok's excited voice echoed loudly and filled the empty hallway.
1200005279.korean: - 지석의 흥분된 목소리는 빈 복도를 쩌렁 쩌렁 울리며 가득 채우고 있었다.

1200005280.english: So you're saying you did nothing wrong, right?

1200005281.english: The hypocrite who pretends to be righteous until the very end...
1200005281.korean: 끝까지 정의로운 척 하는 위선자 새끼…

1200005282.english: What? Are you disgusted by what I'm saying...?

1200005283.english: I'm actually nauseated by your hypocritical behavior...!
1200005283.korean: 난 오히려 너의 그 위선자 같은 모습에 토악질이 쏠려…!

1200005284.english: You'll probably think I'm a heartless bastard for treating your woman like an object...
1200005284.korean: 내가 네 여자를 물건 취급 한다는 것에 피도 눈물도 없는 새끼라 생각하겠지…

1200005285.english: But what about you? You feel no guilt or sense of crisis about your only sister's suspicious death!
1200005285.korean: 하지만 넌 어떻지? 네 하나뿐인 여동생의 의문사에 대해 그 어떤 죄책감도, 위기의식도 느끼지 않잖아!

1200005286.english: Your fake behavior is so repulsive, it's almost scary!
1200005286.korean: 그런 네 가식적인 모습에 소름이 끼치다 못해 무서울 정도야!

1200005288.english: - As if he had something to hide, Adam turned his head away from Ji-seok's gaze.
1200005288.korean: - 애덤은 무언가 숨기는 것이라도 있는 지, 지석의 눈을 피해 고개를 돌렸다.

1200005289.english: - In the heavy silence of the two men, the bustling hallway suddenly became quiet.
1200005289.korean: - 두 남자의 무거운 침묵 속에, 소란스럽던 복도는 삽시 고요해졌다.

1200005290.english: - Adam roughly wiped the blood flowing from his nose with the sleeve of his gown and spat out the blood that had filled his mouth.
1200005290.korean: - 애덤은 코에서 흐르는 피를 가운 소매로 대충 수습하고 입안 가득 고인 피를 아무렇게나 뱉었다.

1200005293.english: Now, it seems we've come too far down different paths to turn back.
1200005293.korean: 이제와 되돌아가기엔 우린 너무 다른 길을 온 것 같다.

1200005294.english: Actually, the fact that you've been continuously renting out empty hospital rooms,
1200005294.korean: 사실 네가 빈 병실을 계속 대실하고 있다는 사실도,

1200005295.english: And the fact that he's embezzling company funds to buy a large quantity of that expensive Origin Dust,
1200005295.korean: 그 비싼 오리진 더스트를 대량으로 구매하기 위해 회사 자금을 빼돌리고 있다는 것도,

1200005296.english: And on top of that, you, who are never satisfied and cling to money like it's your life...
1200005296.korean: 그마저도 모자라다며, 돈이라면 사족을 못 쓰고 매달리는 널…

1200005297.english: I pretended not to know, even tho I knew everything.

1200005298.english: Rather than figuring out what you're up to right away,
1200005298.korean: 네가 뭘 하려는 수작인지, 당장 알아내는 것 보다

1200005299.english: If that's what it takes to ease your troubled heart...
1200005299.korean: 그렇게 해서라도 혼란스러운 네 맘이 편해질 수만 있다면…

1200005300.english: If you could let go of the burden you carry about Rachel and dream better dreams like before...
1200005300.korean: 네가 레이첼에 대한 마음의 짐을 덜고 예전처럼 더 나은 꿈을 꿀 수 있다면…

1200005302.english: Friend... No, I was thinking of you as more than a brother, so I just waited quietly.
1200005302.korean: 친구... 아니, 형제 그 이상으로 생각하고 있었기 때문에 잠자코 기다렸어.

1200005303.english: Because I trust you, no matter what choice you make, I'm on your side!
1200005303.korean: 널 믿으니까, 네가 어떤 선택을 하던 난 네 편이니까!

1200005304.english: But now, it's hard to hold on.

1200005305.english: Just like you said, we were never brothers or family from the start.
1200005305.korean: 네 말대로 우린 처음부터 형제도, 가족도 아니었어.

1200005306.english: They're just strangers whose lives are important to each of them.
1200005306.korean: 그저 각기의 삶이 중요한 남일 뿐이야.

1200005307.english: I don't want to stand in your way, so let's go our separate ways from here.
1200005307.korean: 네 앞길에 방해가 되고 싶지 않아, 여기부턴 우리 각자의 길을 가자.

1200005310.english: - Ji-seok's face is startled by Adam's remarks.
1200005310.korean: - 애덤의 발언에 지석은 흠칫 놀란 얼굴이다.

1200005311.english: - Having finished what he had to say, Adam calmly tries to leave.
1200005311.korean: - 할 말을 마친 애덤은 덤덤히 자리를 떠나려 한다.

1200005314.english: - Ji-seok jumped up from his seat and strode toward Adam.
1200005314.korean: - 지석은 자리에서 박차고 일어나 애덤 쪽으로 성큼성큼 걸어갔다.

1200005315.english: If you're going to be such a coward and leave the Saman now, do you even know what will happen in the future?
1200005315.korean: 네가 지금 이렇게 겁쟁이처럼 삼안을 나가면 앞으로 무슨 일이 벌어질지는 알고 그러는 건가?

1200005316.english: Who do you think your canned wife can safely stand in front of the camera thanks to?
1200005316.korean: 네 통조림 아내가 그나마 안전하게 카메라 앞에 설 수 있는 게 누구 덕분일 것 같아?

1200005318.english: Adam, you saw it with your own two eyes, didn't you?
1200005318.korean: 애덤, 네 두 눈으로 똑똑히 봤을 거 아냐.

1200005319.english: Protest groups opposing the existence of Bioroids...

1200005320.english: The public scrutiny you and your spouse will face from now on,
1200005320.korean: 앞으로 너희 부부에게 가해질 세간의 시선,

1200005321.english: Your personal life is always the center of attention, no matter where you go...

1200005322.english: Now that you, who are with Saman, are with me, it might feel like someone else's story, but...
1200005322.korean: 지금에야 삼안 소속인 네가 나와 함께 있으니 꼭 타인의 이야기처럼 느껴지겠지만,

1200005323.english: After leaving Saman, can you protect that woman from countless villains all by yourself...?
1200005323.korean: 삼안을 떠난 이후, 너 홀로 수 많은 악인들로부터 그 여자를 지켜낼 수 있을까…?

1200005325.english: Even if you couldn't protect your sister...

1200005326.english: You shouldn't repeat the same mistake, should you?
1200005326.korean: 같은 실수를 반복하진 말아야 할 거 아니야.

1200005327.english: There's no reason to make even Saman, who you've been through thick and thin with, your enemy, right?
1200005327.korean: 동고동락하던 삼안까지 네 적으로 삼을 이유 없잖아, 응?

1200005328.english: - Although it was threatening, Adam squeezed his eyes shut at Ji-seok's reasonable remarks.
1200005328.korean: - 협박성이긴 하지만 지석의 일리 있는 발언에 애덤은 부라리던 눈을 질끈 감았다.

1200005330.english: I'm hurting, I'm hurting so much, Ji-seok...

1200005331.english: What's the point of all this...?

1200005332.english: ... I hope you'll stop gossiping about my family, including me.
1200005332.korean: ...나를 포함한 내 가족 이름 모두 더는 네 입방아에 올리지 말아줬음 좋겠다.

1200005334.english: - Unlike the firm choice of separation, Adam's expression was contorted in anguish, as if showing his helplessness.
1200005334.korean: - 굳건한 갈라섬의 선택과 달리 애덤의 표정은 자신의 무력함을 나타내듯 참담으로 고통스레 일그러져있었다.

1200005335.english: - And so, Adam gracefully turned away from Ji-seok and Saman Industries.
1200005335.korean: - 애덤은 그렇게 유유히 지석과 삼안산업으로부터 걸음을 돌렸다.

1200005336.english: - After the argument with Ji-seok, Adam returned to the space where Eva was.
1200005336.korean: - 지석과의 언쟁 이후 애덤은 에바가 있는 공간으로 돌아왔다.

1200005337.english: - She was standing next to a small panel Adam had set up, with colorful wires connected to various parts of her body to record her vitals.
1200005337.korean: - 그녀는 애덤이 마련해 준 작은 패널 옆에서 바이탈 기록을 남기기 위해 몸 곳곳에 색색의 전선을 연결한 모습이었다.

1200005338.english: Hmm... Honey...? When did you come? I must have dozed off.
1200005338.korean: 으음… 여보…? 언제 왔어요? 깜빡 잠들었나 봐요,

1200005339.english: ...I'm sorry to bother you while you're resting.

1200005340.korean: ...안색이 안 좋은데, 무슨 일 있었던 거예요?

1200005341.english: - She opened her arms toward the gaunt-looking man.
1200005341.korean: - 그녀가 초췌한 몰골의 남자를 향해 두 팔을 벌렸다.

1200005342.english: - As usual, Adam leaned into her arms naturally, closed his eyes, and rested.
1200005342.korean: - 애덤은 평소와 같이 자연스럽게, 그녀의 품 속에 기대 눈을 감았다.

1200005343.english: He's huge, but he's just like a baby...
1200005343.korean: 덩치만 커다랗지, 순 갓난 아기가 따로 없다니까…

1200005344.english: When are you going to grow up?

1200005345.english: Addie, I know you always get so upset like this when you come back after arguing with Ji-seok.
1200005345.korean: 애디 당신, 지석씨와 다투고 돌아오면 항상 이렇게 속상해하는 거 알아요?

1200005347.english: They say siblings grow up fighting.

1200005349.english: Please pretend you didn't see me, for now...

1200005350.english: Honey...? What is all this? You, were you right...?
1200005350.korean: 여보…? 이게 다 뭐예요? 당신, 맞았어요…?

1200005351.english: Oh, it hurts... Don't touch it so hard...

1200005352.english: Oh my goodness... How old are those two now, and they're still making pinky promises?
1200005352.korean: 세상에… 지금 두 사람이 몇 살인데 주먹 다짐이에요?

1200005356.english: - Despite Eva's persistent questions, Adam remained silent, like a calm lake filled with tears.
1200005356.korean: - 에바의 끈질긴 질문에도 애덤은 그저 눈물로 가득 찬 잔잔한 호수와 같이 침묵을 이어갔다.

1200005358.english: Eve, I don't know if this is right...
1200005358.korean: 이브, 난 이게 맞는 지 모르겠어…

1200005361.english: When they asked me what I was doing the day my sister died,
1200005361.korean: 나한테 내 여동생이 죽은 날 뭐하고 있었냐고 물었을 땐,

1200005362.english: It felt like my heart was being thrown around...

1200005365.english: If it had been me, not Rachel, who had a hole in their chest...!"
1200005365.korean: 가슴에 구멍이 뚫린 게 레이첼이 아니라, 나였더라면…!

1200005366.english: If only that bullet had hit me instead...!!!
1200005366.korean: 그 총알 한 발이 차라리 나한테 박혔더라면…!!!

1200005367.english: But even knowing that, I couldn't stop it...
1200005367.korean: 하지만 그걸 알고서도 막을 수 없었던…

1200005371.english: I yelled at Ji-seok that he was the worst in the world, but...

1200005372.english: Actually, the worst person is me, who knew everything but didn't stop it...
1200005372.korean: 사실 가장 최악은 모든 걸 알고 있으면서도 막지 않았던 나야…

1200005374.english: ...But, you know I couldn't help it, Adam.
1200005374.korean: …하지만, 어쩔 수 없었다는 걸 알고 있잖아요, 애덤.

1200005375.english: ...not just the wealth and fame of an individual like Mr. Ji-seok, but... The destiny of a man destined for greater things is always lonely and arduous...
1200005375.korean: 지석 군과 같이 한낱 개인의 부와 명예가 아닌... 보다 더 큰일을 해야 할 사내의 숙명은 언제나 외롭고 고달픈 법…

1200005376.english: Just as Ms. Rachel has always completely trusted your choice, her own brother,
1200005376.korean: 레이첼 양도 친오빠인 당신의 선택을 전적으로 믿어왔던만큼,

1200005377.english: Please don't burden your heart any further.
1200005377.korean: 부디 마음의 짐을 늘리지 않았으면 좋겠어요.

1200005378.english: With time, I'm sure the day will come when Ji-seok will understand you too.
1200005378.korean: 시간이 지나면 분명, 지석씨도 당신을 이해해 줄 날이 올 거예요.

1200005380.english: Was there really no other way...?

1200005382.english: Honestly speaking, I... when you first brought up the Bioroid procedure to Ji-seok,
1200005382.korean: 솔직히 말해서 난… 당신이 지석이한테 처음 바이오로이드 시술 이야기를 꺼낼 때,

1200005383.english: I never imagined you'd bring up Rachel...
1200005383.korean: 레이첼 이야기를 꺼낼 줄 상상조차 못했어…

1200005384.english: Honey, that was definitely... that was a deception!

1200005385.english: It's practically the same as openly calling Ji-seok a crazy person...!
1200005385.korean: 대놓고 지석일 정신병자 취급한 거나 마찬가지라고…!

1200005386.english: It's definitely my fault that Ji-seok ended up like this...
1200005386.korean: 지석이가 이렇게 된 건 내 책임도 분명 있어요…

1200005388.english: Damn it... it feels like all the beliefs I was barely holding onto are about to crumble completely...
1200005388.korean: 젠장… 그나마 붙들고 있던 나의 신념이 전부 무너져버릴 것만 같아…

1200005391.english: - Eva grabs Adam's face with both hands, presses their foreheads together neatly, and repeats.
1200005391.korean: - 에바는 양손으로 애덤의 얼굴을 부여잡고 가지런히 이마를 맞대며 되뇐다.

1200005392.english: The more difficult the situation, the stronger you need to be.
1200005392.korean: 이럴 때 일수록 마음을 굳건하게 먹어야 해요.

1200005395.english: They say men mature when they become the head of the household.
1200005395.korean: 남자는 가장이 되면 철이 든 다고 하던데.

1200005396.english: We still have so much left to do, Addie.
1200005396.korean: 우리 아직 못다 한 것들이 너무 많잖아요, 애디.

1200005397.english: - Meanwhile, after the argument with Adam...

1200005399.english: Where did it all go wrong...?

1200005401.english: Why aren't you opening your eyes...!!!

1200005403.english: The remaining amount of Origin Dust is currently less than 20%.

1200005404.english: - He slammed the test tube against the glass with his fist, his voice trailing off in tears.
1200005404.korean: - 그는 시험관 유리를 주먹으로 내리치며 눈물 섞인 어투로 말끝을 흐렸다.

1200005406.english: If I had been by your side then...

1200005407.english: If that bullet had gone through my head...!!!

1200005408.english: - With a sorrowful gaze, Jiseok gently strokes the underwater test tube instead of Rachel's still sleeping skin.
1200005408.korean: - 애처로운 눈빛의 지석은 고요히 잠들어있는 레이첼의 피부 대신 수중 시험관을 쓰다듬는다.

1200005410.english: I did everything I could... everything...
1200005410.korean: 내가 할 수 있는 건 전부… 전부 다 했는데…

1200005411.english: Why haven't you opened your eyes yet...?
1200005411.korean: 어째서 아직도 눈을 뜨지 못하는 거야…

1200005415.english: You're alive... you're breathing just fine...

1200005417.english: My world without you no longer has any meaning...
1200005417.korean: 네가 없는 내 세상은 더 이상 아무런 의미가 없는데…

1200005418.english: Why are you trying to abandon me too...?
1200005418.korean: 왜 너 마저 날 버리려 하는 거야…

1200005419.english: - Ji-seok collapsed onto the laboratory floor with a look of having lost everything.
1200005419.korean: - 지석은 모든 것을 잃은 표정으로 실험실 바닥에 엎어졌다.

1200005421.english: - ... A familiar voice is heard softly from somewhere.

1200005424.english: Give me control of your body!

1200005426.english: This is your doing, isn't it?

1200005427.english: Bringing up Eva's situation when Adam said he was leaving Saman was also...
1200005427.korean: 삼안을 떠나겠다는 애덤한테 에바 일을 들먹였던 것도…

1200005429.english: You don't mean 'At that time, I really felt like I wasn't myself!' You're not trying to make excuses, are you?
1200005429.korean: 설마 '그땐 정말이지 내가 내가 아닌 기분이었어!' 따위 변명을 하고 싶은 건 아니겠지?

1200005431.english: Even if I deceive others, I can never deceive myself!
1200005431.korean: 남을 속여도 난 절대 속이지 못해!

1200005432.english: It felt so refreshing, like a years-old knot in my stomach had finally dissolved, didn't it?
1200005432.korean: 몇 년 묵은 체증이 가시듯 후련했잖아, 응?

1200005434.english: And your carefully considered judgment amounts to nothing more than...
1200005434.korean: 심혈을 기울인 네 녀석의 판단이란게 고작…

1200005435.english: Are you saying we should just let Rachel slowly die day by day...?
1200005435.korean: 하루 하루 천천히 죽어가는 레이첼을 방치하는 것이란 말인가…

1200005436.english: Ah, you cursed child, astonishingly incompetent and foolish,
1200005436.korean: 아아, 놀라울 정도로 무능하고 아둔한 저주받은 아이야,

1200005438.english: It's none other than you yourself!
1200005438.korean: 그 누구도 아닌 바로 네 자신이!

1200005440.english: - Ji-seok's expression immediately began to crumple like a wad of paper.
1200005440.korean: - 지석의 표정은 손으로 구긴 종이뭉치처럼 단숨에 일그러지기 시작한다.

1200005441.english: Nothing is left by your side.
1200005441.korean: 네 곁엔 그 무엇도 남아있지 않아.

1200005448.english: You just need to surrender your body and soul to me... hehe.
1200005448.korean: 내게 몸과 마음을 모두 맡기기만 하면 될 뿐이야… 킥킥.

1200005461.english: Chairman, I am very sorry for calling so late.

1200005462.english: I have something urgent to report.

1200005465.english: I heard the second android project, , has been discontinued.
1200005465.korean: 두 번째 바이오로이드 프로젝트 <케인>이 중단되었다고 합니다.

1200005468.english: ...Don't beat around the bush, just say it directly.

1200005469.english: ... Chairman Adam personally ordered the project to be halted.

1200005471.english: I'll handle it myself and settle things with Adam directly.
1200005471.korean: 내가 직접 애덤과 단판을 짓도록 하지.

1200005474.english: Chairman Adam doesn't want to speak to anyone other than his wife and personal secretary for the time being...
1200005474.korean: 애덤 회장님께서 당분간 사모님과 직속 비서 외엔 그 누구와 말을 섞고 싶지 않으니…

1200005475.english: The development room is under orders that no one is allowed inside.
1200005475.korean: 개발실엔 아무도 안에 들리지 말라는 명이 있으셔서요.

1200005477.english: Are you saying we should keep this childish fight going until now...?

1200005478.english: He's a useless old man who doesn't act his age!

1200005479.english: This is a company, not a neighborhood playground where you settle disputes with personal feelings and take sides!
1200005479.korean: 여긴 회사야, 사적인 감정으로 시시비비를 따져가며 편가르기 하는 동네 놀이터가 아니라고!

1200005480.english: As the rightful CEO of Saman, I need to exercise my authority over the CTO, Adam.
1200005480.korean: 엄연한 삼안의 CEO로서, 난 CTO인 애덤에게 정당한 권리를 행사해야겠어.

1200005481.english: Just tell me where Adam is right now, immediately!
1200005481.korean: 애덤이 지금 어디 있는지나 말해, 당장!

1200005484.english: How did the chairman get here...?

1200005486.english: Have I come somewhere I shouldn't be?
1200005486.korean: 내가 오면 안 될 곳이라도 온 건가?

1200005487.english: Chairman Adam said not to let anyone in for the time being.
1200005487.korean: 애덤 회장님께서 당분간 아무도 들이지 말라고 하셨습니다.

1200005489.english: It seems like everyone has decided to completely ignore me!
1200005489.korean: 하나같이 다들 나를 아주 개무시 하기로 작정한 모양이군!

1200005495.english: - Despite Amina's pleas, Ji-seok pushed her aside and entered Adam's lab.
1200005495.korean: - 지석은 아미나의 만류에도 그녀를 밀치며 애덤의 연구실로 들어섰다.

1200005497.english: - Ji-seok pulled on Adam's shoulder, who was so engrossed in his research and focused on his work that he hadn't noticed.
1200005497.korean: - 지석은 연구 삼매경에 빠져 신경을 한 데 집중하고 있는 애덤의 어깨를 잡아당겼다.

1200005499.english: - Adam looked like he was on the verge of collapse, as if he hadn't been sleeping well lately.
1200005499.korean: - 애덤은 최근 수면의 질이 좋지 않았던 모양인지, 폐인의 몰골에 가까웠다.

1200005500.english: - He looks up at Ji-seok with hollow, sunken eyes. His dull eyes have no focus.
1200005500.korean: - 퀭하게 푹 페인 눈으로 지석을 올려다본다. 흐리멍덩한 그의 눈엔 초점이 없다.

1200005501.english: How did I even get in here...?

1200005502.english: I'm sure I told everyone not to let anyone in...

1200005503.english: Is that what's important right now?!

1200005504.english: Who are you to arbitrarily halt the major project of the Saman?
1200005504.korean: 네가 뭔데 멋대로 삼안의 중대 프로젝트를 중단하는 거지?

1200005505.english: Have you forgotten that you've already presented to the buyers?
1200005505.korean: 이미 바이어들에게 <케인>에 대해 발표한 사실 잊었어?

1200005506.english: Do you know how much damage this kind of repetition will do to our Saman's image?
1200005506.korean: 이런 식의 번복이 우리 삼안의 이미지에 얼마나 큰 타격을 줄지 알아?

1200005507.english: If you're not careful, all investment support could be cut off!
1200005507.korean: 까딱하다간 투자 지원도 전부 끊길지 모른다고!

1200005508.english: Even without that, things have been quiet since the Eva prototype announcement, and there's already nonsense circulating about technology being siphoned off from the outside...!"
1200005508.korean: 안 그래도 에바 프로토타입 발표 이후로 잠잠해서 외부로부터 빼돌린 기술이다 뭐다 헛소리가 나도는 마당에…!

1200005510.english: What does that have to do with me...?

1200005513.english: Can't you see I'm just focusing on my research, just like you wanted?
1200005513.korean: 네가 원하는 대로 연구에만 몰두하고 있는 거 안 보여…?

1200005516.english: It seems you're under some kind of grand delusion...
1200005516.korean: 뭔가 대단한 착각을 하고 있는 모양인데...

1200005517.english: The research you're doing now isn't something I forced you to do.
1200005517.korean: 네가 지금 하고 있는 연구는 내가 강제한 게 아니야.

1200005521.english: Are you tired? Okay, I understand.

1200005522.english: Since you don't seem to understand at all, I'll explain it again.
1200005522.korean: 도통 이해를 못 하는 것 같으니 다시 설명해 주지.

1200005525.english: You useless bastard, you can't do anything without Saman.
1200005525.korean: 삼안이 없으면 아무것도 할 수 없는 이 무능력한 새끼야.

1200005526.english: - Adam's reaction, which seemed to have already crumbled despite Ji-seok's continued verbal abuse, was lackluster.
1200005526.korean: - 이어지는 지석의 폭언에도 이미 무너져내린 것만 같은 애덤의 반응은 무미건조했다.

1200005527.english: Instead of just eating and wasting food, you should do your job properly, right?
1200005527.korean: 밥만 축내지 말고 맡은 바 일을 똑바로 해야지?

1200005532.english: You know, Kane. The project you unilaterally stopped without even consulting me.
1200005532.korean: <케인> 말이야. 나와의 상의도 일절 없이 네 멋대로 중단시킨 프로젝트.

1200005538.english: This bastard, even until the end...

1200005539.english: ... Kane needs my DNA and my wife's DNA in his genetic chain.
1200005539.korean: ...케인의 유전자 사슬에 나와 내 아내의 DNA가 필요해.

1200005540.english: ...the very idea of aiming for mass production is absurd.
1200005540.korean: …대량 생산을 목표 한다는 것 자체가 말이 안 돼.

1200005541.english: ... This is like my own child.

1200005542.english: Being treated like a commodity... Uh, Eva, just Eva... That's enough...
1200005542.korean: 상품 취급 당하는 건... 에, 에바, 에바 하나로... 족해….

1200005544.english: Do you think this is where your family plays house?!
1200005544.korean: 여기가 네 가족들 소꿉놀이하는 곳인 줄 알아?!

1200005545.english: Me, me too... I know too, please, please... please, just... that mouth... Shut up!
1200005545.korean: 나, 나도… 나도 알아, 제, 제발… 제발, 그 입 좀... 다물어!

1200005546.english: - Consumed by extreme stress, Adam begins to sweat profusely and gasp for breath.
1200005546.korean: - 극도의 스트레스에 잠식된 애덤이 식은땀을 흘리며 숨을 헐떡이기 시작한다.

1200005548.english: That's why I said we should use IVF.

1200005549.english: Wasn't it enough as long as there was a brain with nervous system activity, no matter what it was?
1200005549.korean: 뭐가 됐든 신경계 활동이 일어난 뇌만 있으면 되는 거 아니었어?

1200005550.english: What's the big deal about DNA anyway?
1200005550.korean: DNA에 목숨 거는 이유가 대체 뭐야?

1200005552.english: Adam! We can get as many eggs as we want with good conditions!
1200005552.korean: 애덤! 우린 좋은 조건의 난자라면 얼마든지 구할 수 있어!

1200005553.english: Adam, weren't you the one who vehemently opposed adding reproductive functions to the first androids?
1200005553.korean: 맨 처음 바이오로이드에 생식 기능을 추가하는 걸 극구 반대한 건 애덤, 너잖아?

1200005554.english: Now that you've sorted out the mess of almost becoming a widower at a young age, it seems you regret not having a child who looks like that woman, doesn't it?
1200005554.korean: 젊은 나이에 홀아비 될 뻔한 일 좀 수습되고 보니, 그 계집을 닮은 새끼 하나 갖지 않은 게 두고두고 후회되는 모양이지?

1200005556.english: Creating something from nothing... You think it's easy...?
1200005556.korean: 무, 무… 무에서 유를 차, 창조하는 게... 쉬운 줄 알아…?

1200005558.english: This, this artificial protein mass... There's an area I can follow, oh, no... no...
1200005558.korean: 이, 인공 단백질 덩어리가... 따라할 수 있는 영역이 아, 아니… 아니야…

1200005560.english: So, Kane is your son, so you can't put a price tag on him and sell him...
1200005560.korean: 그래서, 케인은 네 아들이니 가격표 붙여 판매 못 하겠다…

1200005561.english: So you're saying I should go along with that kind of nonsense, are you?
1200005561.korean: 그딴 헛소리를 나더러 따라줘라, 이건가 지금?

1200005562.english: This... Devil... that son of a bitch...! You... And yet... A human...?!
1200005562.korean: 이... 악마… 같은 자식…! 네가... 그러고도... 인간이야…?!

1200005563.english: That's right, I'm the devil's spawn.

1200005565.english: Now, what meaning is there between you and me now?
1200005565.korean: 이제와서 지금의 너와 내 사이에 무슨 의미가 있지?

1200005567.english: Please hand over the project's gene map and module design blueprint to me.
1200005567.korean: 프로젝트 유전자 지도 및 모듈 설계도를 내게 넘겨.

1200005570.english: You won't need your DNA, hand it over to me.
1200005570.korean: 네 DNA를 쓸 일은 없을 거야, 내게 넘겨.

1200005572.english: Adam, just keep doing what you're good at, like you are now.
1200005572.korean: 애덤, 그저 넌 지금처럼 네가 잘하는 걸 하면 돼.

1200005574.english: Will you use this to enjoy the wealth and honor of the Saman, or...
1200005574.korean: 이걸 가지고 삼안의 부와 명예를 누릴 지,

1200005575.english: Whether or not I write a new chapter in history is up to me.
1200005575.korean: 역사의 새 지평을 쓸지 말지는 내가 결정해.

1200005577.english: - Ji-seok confiscates all the processes of Project from Adam and whistles as he surveys the ransacked laboratory.
1200005577.korean: - 지석은 애덤으로부터 프로젝트 <케인>의 모든 프로세스를 압수 후 쑥대밭이 된 연구실을 훑어보며 휘파람을 분다.

1200005581.english: With this, Eva's... Safety is guaranteed, right...?

1200005583.english: Adam, thanks to you immersing yourself in the research.
1200005583.korean: 애덤, 네가 연구에 몰두해 준 덕분에.

1200005584.english: But if you keep doing things that cause the company massive losses, like you did today...
1200005584.korean: 하지만 오늘처럼 회사에 대량의 손실을 가져올 만한 짓을 사서 하다간…

1200005585.english: After that, who knows what will happen?
1200005585.korean: 그 이후로는 어떻게 될지 나도 모를 일이지.

1200005587.english: Please... not Eva, I beg you...

1200005589.english: Make the next-generation Bioroid the strongest, with unprecedented perfection,
1200005589.korean: 차세대 바이오로이드를 전대미문의 완벽함을 지닌 최강으로 만들어,

1200005590.english: If we can just demonstrate that Saman Industrial possesses unprecedented and the strongest technological capabilities in all fields...
1200005590.korean: 삼안 산업이 모든 분야에서 전대미문 최강의 기술력을 보유하고 있다는 걸 과시할 수만 있다면…

1200005592.english: ... Available... Please increase the amount of development funding.
1200005592.korean: ...가용 가능한... 개발 자금의 액수를 더 올려줘.

1200005593.english: I will create a masterpiece that rivals the best of all time, not just in appearance but also in its built-in functions, just as you wish...
1200005593.korean: 너가 원하는 대로 외형뿐만 아니라 탑재된 기능까지 시대를 넘어 최고에 버금가는 희대작을 만들게…

1200005595.english: Finally, you're starting to make some sense! I'm looking forward to the next results.
1200005595.korean: 드디어 말이 좀 통하는군! 다음 결과를 기대하지.

1200005596.english: From this moment on, nothing will be completed to your liking without my approval, so understand that.
1200005596.korean: 지금 이 시간부로 내 컨펌 없이는 아무것도 네 맘대로 완성하지 못할 거야, 그렇게 알아둬.

1200005598.english: - Ji-seok bursts out of Adam's personal research lab and instructs the group waiting in the hallway.
1200005598.korean: - 지석은 애덤의 개인 연구실로부터 자리를 박차고 나와 복도에 대기 중인 무리에게 지시한다.

1200005599.english: Please send a copy of this project to my personal research lab.
1200005599.korean: 이 프로젝트 카피본은 내 개인 연구실로 전송해놔.

1200005602.english: Please handle the original as I mentioned. We can't let our guard down until we reach Alaska.
1200005602.korean: 원본은 말했던 대로 처리해. 알래스카에 도착할 때까지 감시를 늦춰선 안돼.

1200005603.english: I will keep that in mind.

1200005604.english: - A banquet celebrating the presentation of Saman's

1200005605.english: For the success and happiness of Saman~~!

1200005607.english: Everyone has come a long way to grace this occasion, so,
1200005607.korean: 다들 먼 길까지 오셔서 이 자리를 빛내주시니,

1200005608.english: As the head of Saman, I am simply delighted.

1200005610.english: No, should I call you CEO Kim Ji-seok 'General' now...?
1200005610.korean: 아니 이제는 김지석 '총' 대표라 불러야 하나…?

1200005612.english: What did I say? Didn't you say it would definitely succeed?
1200005612.korean: 내가 뭐랬어. 분명 성공할 거라 그랬잖아?

1200005615.english: Now it's just a matter of hitting the fast track to success!
1200005615.korean: 이제 정말 성공 가도를 질주할 일만 남았군!

1200005617.english: My eye for things is accurate. I told you it was right to scrape together everything and invest, didn't I?
1200005617.korean: 내 안목은 정확하지. 싹싹 긁어 투자하는 게 맞았다니깐?

1200005618.english: Haha... Thank you for your kind words.

1200005620.english: When can we expect the release of a Bioroid that surpasses 'Labiata'?
1200005620.korean: 라비아타'를 뛰어넘는 바이오로이드 출시는 언제 기대해 봄직 한가?

1200005622.english: What kind of person is our CEO, Kim Ji-seok!

1200005623.english: You saw the interview earlier too, didn't you~!

1200005624.english: We clearly... cannot break down the invisible walls of class and race.
1200005624.korean: "보이지 않는 계급과 인종의 벽을 부술 수 없음을 우리는 분명히…"

1200005625.english: - One of the investors awkwardly imitates something Ji-seok said during the interview.
1200005625.korean: - 투자자 중 한 명은 인터뷰 때 지석이 내뱉은 말을 어설프게 흉내 낸다.

1200005626.english: Upon hearing the news of the cancelation of Project in the previous semi-annual report,
1200005626.korean: 일전 반기 보고에서 프로젝트 <케인>의 취소 소식을 듣고는,

1200005627.english: I thought I was going to lose everything I had!
1200005627.korean: 가진 전부를 몽땅 잃는 줄로만 알았는데!

1200005629.english: - Ji-seok could only respond to their conversation, which was laced with subtle sarcasm, with a weary business smile.
1200005629.korean: - 교묘히 비꼬는 말투가 섞인 그들의 대화에 지석은 피로감이 느껴지는 비즈니스 미소로 화답할 뿐이다.

1200005630.english: Please don't dwell too much on the past.

1200005631.english: If the investors who recognized the future value of Saman before anyone else start getting hung up on such trivial matters...
1200005631.korean: 누구보다 먼저 삼안의 미래 가치를 알아봐 주신 투자자 여러분들께서 그런 사소한 것들에 목매달기 시작하면…

1200005632.english: because you won't be able to see the beautiful big picture that's being completed.
1200005632.korean: 아름답게 완성 되어가는 큰 그림을 보지 못 할 테니까요,

1200005633.english: Is that how you should be, considering you're the ones who will do great things in the future?
1200005633.korean: 장차 큰일을 하셔야 할 분들이 그래서야 되겠습니까?

1200005638.english: So, is the project completely scrapped?
1200005638.korean: 그러면 프로젝트 <케인>은 아예 폐기 된 건가?

1200005642.english: - As Ji-seok remained silent under persistent questioning, the banquet hall was enveloped in silence, following the leader's lead.
1200005642.korean: - 끈질긴 추궁에 지석이 말을 아끼자 연회장은 수장을 따라 적막으로 뒤덮였다.

1200005645.english: Especially on a day as joyful as today...!

1200005647.korean: 이 즐거운 날, 부디 즐겨 주시기 바랍니다.

1200005648.english: - Ji-seok once again reassured the person he was talking to with a gentle smile.
1200005648.korean: - 지석은 다시 한 번 온화한 미소로 대화 중인 상대를 안심시켰다.

1200005649.english: Then, I'll end the greetings here and head back in.
1200005649.korean: 그럼 인사는 이쯤 해 두고, 저는 이만 들어가 보도록 하겠습니다.

1200005650.english: Wait, is it even possible for the protagonist to be going back already?!
1200005650.korean: 아닛, 주인공이 벌써 돌아가는 게 말이 되나…?!

1200005651.english: As you pointed out, for someone as lacking as myself to dare satisfy the support of our esteemed guests,
1200005651.korean: 지적하신 바와 같이, 모자란 제가 감히 귀빈 여러분들의 성원을 만족시키기 위해서는

1200005652.english: We'll need to quickly select the next project.

1200005653.english: - Ji-seok nodded or waved to a few more familiar faces and then left the banquet hall.
1200005653.korean: - 지석은 추가로 몇몇 익숙한 얼굴에게 고개를 숙이거나 팔을 흔들며 연회장을 떠났다.

1200005654.english: Ugh... what a truly inscrutable person.
1200005654.korean: 으… 정말 속을 알 수 없는 인간이로군.

1200005656.english: You, stop asking about the canceled project!
1200005656.korean: 자네, 더는 취소된 프로젝트에 대해 알려 들지 말게나!

1200005657.english: Wasn't it because there was something unreliable about him that things turned out this way?
1200005657.korean: 영 미덥지 못한 구석이 있었으니 이렇게 된 게 아니겠나?

1200005658.english: That said, there's no benefit to upsetting CEO Kim Ji-seok.
1200005658.korean: 그렇다고 김지석 대표 심기를 거슬러 좋을 게 하나 없어.

1200005659.english: ... I was just purely curious! I didn't have any bad feelings.

1200005660.english: I just thought the idea of a male humanoid was a pretty good change of pace.
1200005660.korean: 남성형 바이오로이드라니 발상의 전환이 썩 나쁘지 않다고 느꼈을 뿐이야.

1200005662.english: Women are where the money is, don't go against the natural order.
1200005662.korean: 돈이 되는 건 여자야, 섭리를 거스르지 말라고.

1200005663.english: I'm also thinking of placing a custom order with Saman.
1200005663.korean: 나도 삼안에 개인 맞춤 제작 의뢰를 넣을 생각이네,

1200005664.english: Take this opportunity to get one for your mansion too.
1200005664.korean: 이 기회에 자네 저택에도 한 채 들이게나.

1200005665.english: Since it takes a considerable amount of time to produce, if you hesitate, you won't be able to receive the item this year.
1200005665.korean: 제작까지 상당수 일이 걸리니 고민하다간 금년 안에 물건 받아보긴 어려울 거야,

1200005666.english: - Early in the evening, the sound of someone's unfamiliar heels approaches the chairman's office at Saman.
1200005666.korean: - 이른 저녁, 삼안의 회장실 앞으로 낯선 누군가의 구두굽 소리가 가까워진다.

1200005669.english: I've heard a lot about it.

1200005670.english: I am Kim Ji-seok, the CEO of Saman Industrial.

1200005671.english: - Ji-seok extended his hand in a handshake as a gesture of welcome.
1200005671.korean: - 지석은 환영의 의미를 담아 악수를 건넸다.

1200005672.english: - The other person stares blankly at his outstretched hand.
1200005672.korean: - 상대는 내밀어진 그의 손을 물끄러미 내려다본다.

1200005673.english: - Jiseok's hands are still covered in unhealed wounds.
1200005673.korean: - 여전히 지석의 손은 아물지 않은 상처가 가득하다.

1200005674.english: So the head of Saman has already heard my story...
1200005674.korean: 삼안의 총수께서 이미 제 이야기를 들으셨다니…

1200005675.english: Wow, this is quite an honor.

1200005677.english: The CEO of the newly established military company, ,

1200005679.english: - Instead of taking his hand, which was still wet, Angel gently pulled him in by the shoulder, embraced him, and let out a hearty laugh.
1200005679.korean: - 앙헬은 진물이 마르지 않은 그의 손을 잡는 대신 어깨를 가볍게 당겨 안으며 호탕한 웃음소리를 냈다.

1200005680.english: It's an honor that you've come all this way. On the contrary, I couldn't be more honored.
1200005680.korean: 영광이라뇨, 먼 곳까지 걸음하시고. 오히려 제가 영광이 아닐 수 없군요.

1200005681.english: To be able to chat with the CEO of the company that stands tall as the leader in the defense industry...
1200005681.korean: 군수산업체 최강자리에 우뚝 올라 서 있는 기업의 대표님과 담소를 나누게 되다니.

1200005682.english: I was just wondering what made Mago International decide to invest in an outdated military project.
1200005682.korean: 마고 인터내셔널'에서 무슨 연유로 철 지난 군 사업에 투자를 결심한 건지 궁금하던 참이거든요.

1200005683.english: ... Oh, really? Indeed, your preliminary research is quite extensive.

1200005684.english: There must be a reason why you're hyping me up so much.
1200005684.korean: 이렇게까지 띄워 주시는 데엔 다 이유가 있겠죠,

1200005685.english: You can speak to me comfortably.

1200005686.english: Since he's a guy who's been through the wringer...
1200005686.korean: 굴러먹을 대로 굴러 먹다 온 놈이다 보니...

1200005687.english: I'm not naive enough to spill internal secrets just because someone gave me a few compliments.
1200005687.korean: 순진하게 칭찬 몇 마디로 내부 기밀을 술술 불 수준은 아니라서요.

1200005688.english: Haha... Well, that was quite rude of me.

1200005691.english: I've heard the story about Adam Jones' sister...
1200005691.korean: 애덤 존스의 누이 분 이야기는 익히 들었습니다…

1200005692.english: I really want to express my regret.

1200005693.english: - Jiseok's expression, which had been relaxed until now, suddenly turned fierce.
1200005693.korean: - 여태 여유롭던 지석의 표정이 일순간 포악스레 변화했다.

1200005695.english: Since I'm not the type to chat casually in public settings...
1200005695.korean: 제가 공적인 자리에서는 사담을 좋아하는 편이 아닌지라…

1200005696.english: Shall we get straight to the point?

1200005698.english: Could we start by reviewing the data containing all the details needed for the implementation of ?
1200005698.korean: <케인>의 구현에 필요한 모든 내역이 담긴 데이터부터 확인할 수 있을까요?

1200005699.english: - Angel received the external hard drive containing the data for Project Cain from Ji-seok.
1200005699.korean: - 앙헬은 프로젝트 <케인>의 데이터가 보관된 외장하드를 지석으로부터 전달받았다.

1200005700.english: Here it is. Take a look, please.

1200005703.english: I never thought they'd just hand over such important internal documents so easily...
1200005703.korean: 이렇게 중요한 내부 문서를 쉽게 내줄 거라곤…

1200005704.english: You're more cool than I expected, CEO Kim Ji-seok.
1200005704.korean: 생각 이상으로 쿨한 구석이 있군요, 김지석 대표님?

1200005705.english: Haha, I'm honored that you think so.

1200005707.english: It's not an amount to be taken lightly, so...

1200005709.english: After all, the Android line is also a high-value means that represents the current Saman.
1200005709.korean: 아무래도 바이오로이드 라인은 지금의 삼안을 대표하는 고부가가치 수단이기도 하고,

1200005710.english: Even if it's an item for disposal, I don't understand why it's being disposed of so easily like this.
1200005710.korean: 폐기 항목이라고 한들, 이리 손쉽게 처분하는 까닭을 모르겠단 말이죠.

1200005711.english: Our Black River will use this as a basis to create a product comparable to the Saman.
1200005711.korean: 우리 블랙 리버는 이걸 토대로 삼안에 버금가는 제품을 만들 겁니다.

1200005712.english: Countless mid-to-low-priced copy products will flood the market, and
1200005712.korean: 무수히 많은 중저가 카피 상품이 시장에 넘쳐나게 될 테고,

1200005713.english: The perception of Saman Technology, which was attracting global attention, also...
1200005713.korean: 세계적으로 주목받던 삼안 기술에 대한 인식도,

1200005714.english: At some point, it will probably become a mass-produced item that any company can copy if they just have a little money.
1200005714.korean: 어느 순간부턴 돈만 조금 있으면 어느 기업이든 따라 만들 수 있는 공산품 즈음으로 바뀌겠지요.

1200005716.english: Even the hundreds of millions of won in transaction value that Saman demanded from me feels like a small amount...
1200005716.korean: 삼안이 제게 요구한 수억 대의 거래액도 푼돈처럼 느껴지는데…

1200005717.english: Unless it's for expanding a new business, a man who doesn't particularly need to be stressed, having spent most of his life investing in and perfecting a trade secret...
1200005717.korean: 새로운 사업 확장 건이 아니고서야 특별히 쪼들릴 일 없으신 양반께서, 인생의 대부분을 투자해 완성한 기업 비밀을…

1200005718.english: Is there a reason you decided to sell it to me, of all people?
1200005718.korean: 다름 아닌 저한테 팔아넘기기로 작정한 이유가 있습니까?

1200005721.english: As you know, the current supply of Bioroids is largely dominated by custom orders aimed at high-end customers.
1200005721.korean: 아시다시피, 현재 바이로이드에 대한 공급은 상류층 고객을 대상으로 한 주문 제작이 차지하는 비율이 가장 큽니다.

1200005722.english: In particular, the release of the 'Labiata Prototype' has really accelerated the distribution speed.
1200005722.korean: 특히나, '라비아타 프로토타입'의  출시 이래로 배급 속도에도 불이 붙었고요.

1200005723.english: In the case of Project , it only amounts to a male version of the Eva prototype, therefore
1200005723.korean: 프로젝트 <케인>의 경우, 에바 프로토타입의 남성 버전에 그치기 때문에

1200005724.english: So far, it has been pointed out that human DNA is still needed as a material.
1200005724.korean: 아직까진 인간의 DNA가 재료로 필요하다는 점이 지적을 받았고

1200005725.english: Even if it takes time, it's better to show you a more developed version of myself.
1200005725.korean: 시간이 들더라도 더욱 발전된 모습을 보여드리는 편이,

1200005726.english: It was only the public and investors who judged that choosing Saman's products would be worthwhile.
1200005726.korean: 대중들에게나 투자자들에게나 삼안의 상품을 선택하는 데 합당할 거라는 판단이 있었을 뿐입니다.

1200005727.english: It's impossible to know what will happen in the future, but...
1200005727.korean: 훗날 어떻게 될 진 알 수 없는 노릇이지만…

1200005728.english: As of now, Saman is not only not considering formal military Bioroids beyond simple security, but also,
1200005728.korean: 지금으로써 삼안은 단순 치안 외 정식 군사 바이오로이드를 검토하고 있지 않을뿐더러,

1200005729.english: Model Kane is useless because it uses technology from the pre-upgrade version, which is outdated.
1200005729.korean: 모델 케인은 업그레이드 이전 버전의 기술력이 차용돼 쓸모가 없습니다.

1200005730.english: In conclusion, although the rejection was decided because our main customer base consists of corporate executives,
1200005730.korean: 결론적으로, 저희 주 고객층은 기업 총수 분들이기에 기각이 결정되었지만,

1200005731.english: If it is a Bioroid intended for military purposes, like 'Black River Inc.', it is judged that there is no particular cause for concern.
1200005731.korean: (주) 블랙리버'와 같이 군사목적용 바이오로이드라면 딱히 우려될 것은 없다고 판단됩니다.

1200005734.english: This is a separate matter, but...

1200005735.english: Thank you for your response. As a token of my gratitude, I'd like to share some information with you...
1200005735.korean: 답변해주심에 감사함을 느껴 정보 하나 알려드리자면…

1200005737.english: Lately, the anti-Bioroid protest movement seems to be gaining a stronger foothold, even planning anti-corporate riots.
1200005737.korean: 근래 들어 반 바이오로이드 시위 세력의 입지가 단단해지며 반 기업 폭동까지 계획되고 있는 모양이던데,

1200005738.english: Public opinion played a significant role above all else.

1200005739.english: Led by the US government, government organizations are beginning to move toward regulating androids.
1200005739.korean: 미 정부를 주축으로 정부단체에서는 바이오로이드에 대한 규제가 시작되려는 움직임입니다.

1200005741.english: How do you plan to respond to this part?
1200005741.korean: 이 부분에 대해서는 어떻게 대응하실 생각이신지?

1200005743.english: He's been appearing in the media recently to try and win back public sentiment.
1200005743.korean: 안 그래도 최근에 민심을 돌리기 위해 매스컴에 얼굴 비추기를 마다 않고 있습니다.

1200005746.english: To Black River, who has a solid customer base...

1200005747.english: It seems unnecessary to list specific methods for breaking through the three barriers.
1200005747.korean: 굳이 삼안의 타파 방안을 열거하지 않아도 될 듯한데요.

1200005750.english: Rather, I was the one who was rude.

1200005751.english: I'll be going now, as I have a lot of work to do.
1200005751.korean: 전 이만, 할 일이 많아 졌기에 실례하도록 하겠습니다.

1200005752.english: - Despite Ji-seok's sarcasm, Ángel bowed once to show respect in the Eastern manner and then immediately left.
1200005752.korean: - 지석의 비아냥에도 한차례 고개를 숙여 동양식 예의를 차린 앙헬은 곧바로 자리를 떠났다.

1200005755.english: (You guys in 'Black River' are also moving to check our Saman, aren't you?)
1200005755.korean: (너희 '블랙 리버'에서도 우리 삼안을 견제하기 위해 움직이고 있단 거, )

1200005758.english: (Because your overflowing greed will eventually bring about your destruction.)
1200005758.korean: (너희들의 그 그득그득한 욕심이 언젠가 파멸을 부를거니깐.)

1200005761.english: Come on, get up a little!

1200005762.english: - Someone shakes Adam awake, who is sleeping face down in an uncomfortable position.
1200005762.korean: - 불편한 자세로 엎드려 잠든 애덤을 누군가가 흔들어 깨운다.

1200005765.english: - Adam, rubbing his eyes with a disheveled appearance and sitting up, sees a familiar silhouette in front of him.
1200005765.korean: - 부스스한 몰골로 눈을 비비며 상체를 일으킨 애덤 앞에 익숙한 실루엣이 보인다.

1200005766.english: Did you stay up all night researching again?

1200005767.english: Seriously, that guy, isn't it enough that he's making you do all the grunt work for free?
1200005767.korean: 진짜 그 양반, 당신한테 무보수로 허드렛일을 시키는 걸론 모자라대요?

1200005768.english: You don't have anything worth looking at except your body, so what are you going to do if you wear yourself out like this?
1200005768.korean: 봐줄 만한 건 몸 밖에 없으면서, 이러다 축나면 어쩌려고 그래요?

1200005769.english: The only thing worth seeing is...

1200005771.english: So, shouldn't we take good care of it?

1200005772.english: Eve! Didn't you say you were completely smitten with my perfect intellect?
1200005772.korean: 이브! 내 완벽한 지성에 홀딱 반했다고 그러지 않았어요?

1200005774.english: Are you feeling a bit better now?

1200005775.english: - Eva presses a cold can of coffee against Adam's sleepy cheek.
1200005775.korean: - 에바는 차가운 캔커피를 비몽사몽한 애덤의 볼에 갖다 댄다.

1200005779.english: I can't take it anymore, I'm going to set the professor's building on fire...!

1200005782.english: I appreciate you doing things for me, but...

1200005783.english: ... Eve, I think my cheeks are going to freeze.

1200005786.english: How are Professor Raphael's research achievements? Is it going well?
1200005786.korean: 라파엘로 교수님 연구 성과는 어때요? 잘 진행돼가요?

1200005791.english: Analysis of physical mutations caused by Origin Dust...

1200005792.english: Hmm, finding the references will be a lot of work.

1200005796.english: I'm also one of the top students in biotechnology! Did you forget?
1200005796.korean: 나도 생명공학 수석 중 한 명이에요! 잊었어요?

1200005798.english: Let's take a look, shall we? Let's quickly get a grasp of the progress first.
1200005798.korean: 어디 한 번 볼까요? 진척 상황부터 빠르게 파악해 보죠.

1200005799.english: Even things like this... That's amazing!

1200005800.english: ...Wait a minute, stop for a second.

1200005802.english: Why are you calling me that?
1200005802.korean: 당신 어째서… 날 그렇게 부르는 거야?

1200005803.english: ...What's wrong, all of a sudden? Were you that tired?

1200005808.english: Owner? What are you talking about?

1200005810.english: - through the window glass wall, someone is pleading for Adam to hold onto his fading consciousness, calling him "master."
1200005810.korean: - 창문 유리 벽 너머로 누군가 혼미한 정신을 붙들라고 애원하며 애덤을 주인이라 칭한다.

1200005818.english: You were sweating so much in your sleep...

1200005819.english: I've been presumptuous with you, Master...

1200005821.english: - Adam looks down at his damp shirt, soaked with sweat.
1200005821.korean: - 애덤은 땀으로 흥건해진 축축한 셔츠를 내려다본다.

1200005822.english: Did you have a bad dream or something...?
1200005822.korean: 무슨 안 좋은 꿈이라도 꾸신 거예요…?

1200005823.english: And lately, you've been sleeping a lot more...

1200005827.english: ... Just stay here with me, Labiata.

1200005829.english: Because it gets noisy when we meet...

1200005830.english: Where are we supposed to start this class from...?

1200005832.english: You need to get some proper sleep and eat your meals, Master...

1200005833.english: If you keep staying like this, something really bad is going to happen...
1200005833.korean: 계속 이렇게 계시다간 정말 큰일 날 거예요…

1200005835.english: ... Then let's get out of here, okay?

1200005836.english: You're not here because you like it either, and neither am I...
1200005836.korean: 너도 좋아서 여기 있는 게 아니잖아, 나도 마찬가지야…

1200005837.english: Together... to a place where no one can find us...
1200005837.korean: 같이… 아무도 찾을 수 없는 곳으로…

1200005839.english: Neither Kim Ji-seok nor Eva... are there...

1200005841.english: You know you can't move a step from here without the CEO's approval...
1200005841.korean: 대표님 승인 없이는 여기서 한 발자국도 움직일 수 없다는 거 아시잖아요...

1200005844.english: You don't like the gift I gave you...?
1200005844.korean: 내가 준 선물이 맘에 들지 않는 거야…?

1200005845.english: I'll show you a wider world...
1200005845.korean: 네게 더 넓은 세상을 가르쳐 줄게…

1200005848.english: I just feel like it's not the right time to open that precious gift box yet...
1200005848.korean: 아직은 소중한 선물 상자를 열어볼 때가 아니라고 생각될 뿐이에요…

1200005852.english: Class... you should be in class, Labiata.

1200005853.english: Now, teaching you things is my only joy.
1200005853.korean: 지금은 네게 뭔갈 가르치는 일이 내 유일한 낙이야.

1200005856.english: Today, you said you would tell us about "Pandora's Box" from Greek and Roman mythology.
1200005856.korean: 오늘은 그리스로마신화에 등장하는 '판도라의 상자'에 대해 알려주신다고 했어요.

1200005858.english: - Suddenly, a single tear slides down Adam's cheek.
1200005858.korean: - 갑자기 애덤의 뺨에 눈물 한 방울이 미끄러지며 흘러내린다.

1200005865.english: I just dreamed of going back to the beginning.

1200005866.english: - After Saman Industrial announced the 'Labiata Prototype', the 'Age of the Great Bioroids' truly began in human history.
1200005866.korean: - 삼안 산업에서 '라비아타 프로토타입'을 발표한 후, 바야흐로 '대 바이오로이드 시대'가 인류 역사에 막을 올렸다.

1200005867.english: - Most labor sites requiring human workers are beginning to be replaced by Bioroids.
1200005867.korean: - 인력을 요하는 대부분의 노동 현장은 바이오로이드들로 대체되기 시작한다.

1200005868.english: - However, unlike the initial purpose of preventing casualties and increasing labor intensity to provide high-quality service,
1200005868.korean: - 하지만 인명피해를 예방하고 노동 강도를 높여 양질의 서비스를 제공하기 위함이라는 초창기 목적과는 달리,

1200005869.english: - Unemployment reaches 95%, and most of the population is forced to rely on the government for their livelihoods.
1200005869.korean: - 실업률은 95%를 달성했고, 대부분의 인구가 생계를 위해 정부의 힘에 의존할 수밖에 없게 된다.

1200005870.english: - Eventually, people who couldn't bear the hunger any longer began to rise up, demanding the guaranty of labor rights, and the anti-Bioroid forces rapidly grew larger.
1200005870.korean: - 결국 굶주림을 참지 못한 사람들이 노동권의 보장을 들고 일어서기 시작했고, 반 바이오로이드 세력은 빠르게 거대해진다.

1200005873.english: You have been identified as a high-risk individual.

1200005875.english: - In a certain American city, a peaceful citizen protest turns violent.
1200005875.korean: - 미국의 어느 도시, 시민들의 평화 시위는 유혈 사태로 번지게 된다.

1200005881.english: I'll definitely kill them with my own hands!!!

1200005882.english: - Throwing every object in sight, Angel, despite his still-burning rage, stomped on the scattered shards of glass with his boot and growled.
1200005882.korean: - 주변에 보이는 모든 사물을 집어던진 앙헬은 그럼에도 식지 않는 분통에 흩어진 유리 파편을 구둣발로 짓이기며 으르렁댔다.

1200005883.english: I will definitely repay this shameful humiliation...!
1200005883.korean: 이 수치스런 수모는 꼭 갚아 주겠어...!

1200005884.english: I'll chew up everything you have, even your own flesh and blood...!
1200005884.korean: 너의 재산, 너의 혈육까지 전부 씹어 먹어주겠어...!

1200005885.english: Everything you've built up until now, all of it!!!
1200005885.korean: 네놈이 지금까지 쌓아 올린 것, 모두 다!!!

1200005886.english: - There's a commotion outside the door.

1200005887.english: - The sound of someone urgently approaching the CEO's office is getting closer.
1200005887.korean: - 누군가 다급히 대표실 앞으로 다가오는 소리가 가까워진다.

1200005889.english: How are you going to take responsibility for this?!

1200005893.english: Can't you see the gravity of this situation?!
1200005893.korean: 자네는 지금 이 사태가 눈에 안 보이나?!

1200005894.english: I want you to bring a concrete plan for how you're going to take responsibility!!
1200005894.korean: 어떻게 책임질 건지 구체적인 방안을 가져오란 말이야!!

1200005896.english: Can't you see my condition right now...?

1200005897.english: What's most infuriating in this situation isn't you guys, but...
1200005897.korean: 지금 이 상황에 가장 화가 치미는 건, 당신네들이 아니라…

1200005901.english: Alright, alright, you... your actions right now...

1200005902.english: Would it be considered a hostile act against the government?
1200005902.korean: 정부에 대한 적대적 행동으로 받아들여도 되겠지?

1200005905.english: Anyway, your lives and ours are already over...
1200005905.korean: 어차피 당신네나 우리나 이미 끝난 목숨…

1200005907.english: Today's events will be reported to the higher-ups.
1200005907.korean: 오늘 일은 상부에 보고 될 거야.

1200005908.english: And you will have to take responsibility for your words and actions.
1200005908.korean: 그리고 자네가 한 말과 행동에 책임을 져야 할 걸세.

1200005910.english: - As soon as the man finished speaking, Ángel burst out laughing like a madman.
1200005910.korean: - 남자의 말이 끝나기 무섭게 앙헬은 미치광이처럼 웃어댔다.

1200005913.english: It seems the expression "barking like a dog" is quite fitting...
1200005913.korean: 아주 개가 짖는다는 표현이 딱 맞는 거 같군…

1200005917.english: If you've said everything you wanted to say, get out.

1200005918.english: The way I feel right now, I want to shoot you dead right here and now too.
1200005918.korean: 지금 심정으로는 당신도 당장 이 자리에서 쏴 죽여버리고 싶으니깐.

1200005920.english: You'll regret everything you said today...
1200005920.korean: 자네, 오늘 한 말들 전부 후회할걸세…

1200005921.english: - The man sent by the government wanted to hurl all sorts of insults at Angel, but he was too intimidated and couldn't open his mouth.
1200005921.korean: - 정부에서 파견 나온 남자는 앙헬에게 온갖 욕설을 퍼붓고 싶었지만, 지레 겁먹어 입이 떨어지질 않았다.

1200005922.english: - Angel ground his teeth, still seething with undiminished anger.
1200005922.korean: - 앙헬은 아직도 사그라들지 않는 화를 곱씹으며 바득바득 이를 갈았다.

1200005923.english: Even thinking about it now, it's ridiculous...

1200005924.english: So the DNA owner needed for mass production had to be Adam Jones, and no one else...
1200005924.korean: 양산에 필요한 DNA 주인이 애덤 존스가 아니면 안 되는 거였다니…

1200005927.english: You're next after those old people who only know how to bark like dogs...
1200005927.korean: 저 개처럼 짖을 줄만 아는 늙은이들 다음은 너니깐…

1200006084.korean: - 앙헬은 애덤의 목숨 값으로 삼안에게 지속적인 협박 공문을 보냈지만, 어떠한 회신도 받을 수 없었다.

1200006085.english: - How much time had passed? Someone was hugging Adam tightly and calling him desperately.
1200006085.korean: - 얼마나 많은 시간이 흘렀을까, 누군가가 애덤을 부등켜 안고 애타게 그를 불렀다.

1200006094.english: - Tears, like droplets, fall onto Adam's cheek, which is covered in bloodstains.
1200006094.korean: - 핏자국으로 가득한 애덤의 뺨 위로 눈물을 닮은 물방울이 떨어진다.

1200006097.english: Just a little bit more, just a little bit more patience...!

1200006098.english: I need to get to a safe place quickly...!

1200006099.english: We always greet each other like this...
1200006099.korean: 우린 매번… 이런 식으로 안부 인사를 나누는구나…

1200006100.english: - Adam grabbed Labiata's hand and shook his head with the little strength he had left.
1200006100.korean: - 애덤은 라비아타의 손을 붙들고, 얼마 남지 않은 힘으로 고개를 저었다.

1200006103.english: I wanted to tell you too...

1200006104.english: There were a lot of things... thrown...

1200006107.english: - At the same time, on Eva and Amina's side...

1200006112.english: (Why am I feeling this uneasy feeling...?)
1200006112.korean: (이 불안한 감정은 대체 왜 느껴지는 걸까…?)

1200006118.english: (What? Why am I a child again...?)
1200006118.korean: (뭐야, 내가 왜 다시 어린 모습이 됐지…?)

1200006121.english: ... What is it? Why are you calling so urgently?

1200006123.english: Big Brother said he'd help me with my homework...!

1200006125.english: I must have dozed off for a moment.

1200006126.english: - A pleasant breeze gently rustles Jiseok's hair.
1200006126.korean: - 기분 좋은 바람이 지석의 머리를 살랑인다.

1200006128.english: - Rachel glares at Ji-seok with a sulky expression as he stares blankly at the peacefully drifting cumulus clouds.
1200006128.korean: - 평화롭게 흘러가는 뭉게구름을 멍하게 쳐다보고 있는 지석을 레이첼은 뾰로통한 얼굴로 노려본다.

1200006129.english: Big Brother... be honest with me.

1200006130.english: You don't want to do homework with me, right?

1200006133.english: You said you wouldn't play with me if you didn't do your homework first, and now you haven't!
1200006133.korean: 오빠가 먼저 숙제 안 하면 나랑 안 놀아줄 거라고 그랬으면서!

1200006134.english: I even bragged to my brother all day today that I was going to study with Nero today!
1200006134.korean: 울 오빠한테 오늘 네로 오빠랑 같이 공부하기로 한 거 하루 종일 자랑까지 했단 말이야!

1200006135.english: (In a low voice) "Rachel, if you don't do your homework, I'm not going to play with you anymore."
1200006135.korean: (낮은 목소리로) "레이첼, 숙제 안 하며언, 앞으루 너랑 안 노라줄 꺼야아."

1200006136.english: - Rachel, pretending to imitate Ji-seok, speaks in a silly, halting voice and then bursts into giggles.
1200006136.korean: - 레이첼은 지석의 흉내랍시고 바보 같은 목소리로 띄엄띄엄 말을 이어가다 이내 킥킥거린다.

1200006138.english: (For some reason, Rachel's cheeks look puffy today.)

1200006139.english: - Ji-seok unconsciously reached out and stroked Rachel's cheek as she sat across from him.
1200006139.korean: - 지석은 무심코 손가락을 뻗어 마주 앉은 레이첼의 뺨을 어루만졌다.

1200006140.english: - I can feel the soft down.

1200006144.english: - Rachel began to blush, turning as red as a ripe cherry.
1200006144.korean: - 레이첼은 잘 익은 앵두처럼 빨개지기 시작했다.

1200006149.english: Homework... I have to do it.

1200006150.english: (The reason I probably started liking Rachel was...)

1200006154.english: (... Oh, no. So it was all a dream after all...)

1200006155.english: (Lately, I've been sleeping a lot more than usual...)
